summary: Iteration 56: Verified GET /api/picks/analysis endpoint and frontend AnalysisPanel component. All 9 backend tests passed (1 skipped - test account has no picks). Frontend testing confirmed: TAP FOR ANALYSIS hint visible on all tracking cards, clicking card expands analysis panel with all fields (Projected, Confidence, Rec, Matchup, Sharp Summary, Key Evidence, Reasoning, Scenarios, Game Flow, Sub Risk, Tactical Breakdown), clicking again collapses panel, action buttons (edit/delete) don't trigger analysis expand.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing owner picks for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified pick analysis feature: (1) GET /api/picks/analysis?email=...&token=...&pickId=... returns stored prediction with reasoning, tacticalBreakdown, sharpSummary, matchupOverview, keyEvidence fields, (2) Endpoint matches prediction by player ID + prop type from predictions/basketball_predictions collections, (3) Returns {found: false} for picks without stored analysis, returns 404 for non-existent pickId, returns 401 for invalid session, (4) Frontend AnalysisPanel shows all fields when expanded, (5) TAP FOR ANALYSIS hint visible at bottom of each tracking card, (6) Clicking card body expands/collapses analysis, (7) Action buttons (trash/edit/reanalyze) have e.stopPropagation() so they don't trigger analysis expand. Owner has 18 won picks, 8 lost picks, 0 pushed picks. Test account (xaviersteverson@gmail.com) has no picks.
